title: Zyplo Webinars
summary: Learn through live and recorded sessions.
assetInstruction: Optional: add webinar hero image at public/resources/webinars-1.png.
body: Zyplo webinars are designed to shorten learning curves for new and existing teams.
Each session combines product walkthroughs, implementation examples, and team operating practices.
Use webinars for onboarding, process upgrades, and cross-team knowledge sharing.

subsections.title: For Admins and Team Leads
body: Workspace governance and role management.
Project setup standards and status taxonomy design.
Notification strategy to balance awareness and noise.

subsections.title: For Contributors
body: Daily task flow, board hygiene, and time tracking best practices.
How to write high-quality task descriptions and handoff notes.
Using profile, notifications, and activity feed to stay aligned.

subsections.title: For Operations and PMO
body: Reporting and trend analysis across workspace activity.
Identifying bottlenecks from status transition patterns.
Designing repeatable delivery playbooks with Zyplo.

title: How to Get Maximum Value
body: Attend live sessions when possible to ask context-specific questions.
Assign one teammate to capture implementation notes during each session.
Convert webinar learnings into immediate process changes and track outcomes for two weeks.
Build an internal playlist by role so new members can self-serve onboarding content.

title: Community and Case Sessions
summary: Learning from real teams and scenarios.

subsections.title: Scaling Stories
body: How teams moved from ad-hoc tracking to structured workflows.
What changed in notification and status governance as teams grew.
Common migration mistakes and how to avoid them.

subsections.title: Q and A Clinics
body: Hands-on sessions focused on real implementation issues from active teams.
Troubleshooting patterns for assignments, status sync, and activity consistency.
Direct recommendations for frontend and backend coordination.
